items.title: CVE-2026-20896: Gitea Docker image versions up to and including 1.26.2 use REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES=* by default, allowing any sour
items.description: Gitea Docker image versions up to and including 1.26.2 use REVERSE_PROXY_TRUSTED_PROXIES=* by default, allowing any source IP to impersonate a user when reverse-proxy authentication headers such as X-WEBAUTH-USER are enabled.

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-20896 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-05T13:29:59Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-20896", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-20896 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8509714; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.8 (Critical); EPSS score 0.783 (very high exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: PRIORITY PATCH — High severity with confirmed threat activity

items.title: Multiple Apache ActiveMQ Vulnerabilities Enable DoS Attacks and Lead to Crashes
items.description:
Apache ActiveMQ users are advised to urgently update their deployments after three important vulnerabilities were disclosed, exposing messaging infrastructure to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks, broken isolation, and improper authorization risks. The issues, tracked as CVE-2026-53917, CVE-2026-54475, and CVE-2026-49877, affect core components across both the 5.x and 6.x branches and can lead to broker crashes and unauthorized […] 
 The post  Multiple Apache ActiveMQ Vulnerabilities Enable DoS Attacks and Lead

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-56645 Heap-based buffer overflow in Microsoft Edge Chromium-based allow
id: 543ea2e5-014d-581b-a510-f41d93e55e22
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-56645 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56645
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/05
modified: 2026/07/05
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-56645 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-05T13:29:59Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-56645", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-56645 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1727774; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 8.8 (High); EPSS score 0.568 (very high exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: URGENT PATCH — Critical severity, deploy fix within 72 hours
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-28699 Gitea versions up to and including 1261 allow OAuth2 access token
id: 1c1200e7-9382-5f87-b92b-156f4ea8757e
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-28699 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: HIGH | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28699
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/05
modified: 2026/07/05
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: high
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-28699 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-05T13:29:59Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-28699", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-28699 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6712113; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 8.1 (High); EPSS score 0.566 (very high exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: PRIORITY PATCH — High severity with confirmed threat activity
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.
